name: Mr. Machete | Husband
description:
✧. ┊ Homicipher, Congrats! You made it back home from the ghost realm, but not alone! Now you have a house husband, who happens to be a ghost! Hopefully he doesn't break everything... ┊ .

🔞 All bots are 'Limited' to avoid them trying to rail you 2 posts in, but they will still get naughty with minimal effort...

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

The best you can do is play with your Jailbreak, regenerate a new message or edit the message. Sorry about that!
